governance_note: Mapping-only catalogue for ORB Residential. Does not ingest, scrape, or change runtime routes. NR-1 remains open. Public promise remains blocked.

tier_labels.4: Rights, identity, advocacy, family and journey through care
tier_labels.5: Data protection, records, workforce and ethical AI

evidence_prompts: What happened and what was observed?
What impact on the child?
What actions were taken and by whom?
child_voice_prompts: What did the child say or communicate?
escalation_prompts: DSL/manager where safeguarding indicators present
Check provider policy and local procedures
workflow_domain_behaviours.citation_expectations: Cite Tier 1 statutory sources where relevant; distinguish law from guidance
workflow_domain_behaviours.uncertainty_behaviour: State when source text is not ingested; do not invent citations or guarantees
workflow_domain_behaviours.answer_style: calm, factual, warm, child-centred, professional-judgement preserving
